prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides detailed statistics and information on farm businesses specifically in England, including fuel usage, renewable energy generation, and carbon audits conducted in English farms. The data is explicitly stated to relate to farms within England, indicating its direct relevance to that nation.
